headline: AppLovin's Remarkable Growth Continues, But A Downgrade Could Be Near
summary: AppLovin stock is still a "Buy," but investors need to watch its valuation closely. Click here to learn more about APP's potential upside.

headline: Congressman Ro Khanna Bought SNDK Below $50 — He Also Bought This Mid-Cap Software Stock Before An OpenAI Deal Sent It Soaring
summary: Khanna has been accumulating Tenable Holdings since last year, way before its shares jumped after its partnership with OpenAI.
